templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://philosophy.com/pages/contact Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to contact us via this link: https://philosophy.com/pages/contact Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I'm afraid once an order is submitted, we're unable to make any changes or cancel the order. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: Will you create a paraben free line?
templates.content: We have been proactively formulating our products without butyl parabens for several years. Only a handful of our original products still contain paraben-based preservatives and we are actively seeking non-paraben, effective alternatives for these products.

templates.name: Do you offer gift cards?
templates.content: At the moment we do not offer gift cards.

templates.name: Is your body wash sulfate free?
templates.content: Our shampoo, bath, and shower gel products do contain sulfates. Sulfates help create lather and foam in our products and attract oil and water to leave your skin and hair feeling soft and clean. The most common sulfate you'll find in our product ingredient lists is sodium lauryl sulfate, which is safely used in many cosmetic and cleaning products.

templates.name: Do you offer international shipping?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't offer international shipping at the moment.

templates.name: Do you test on animals?
templates.content: We are fully committed to using alternatives to animal testing to ensure the safety of our products. Please be assured that we do not perform, nor do we ever commission any third parties on our behalf to perform animal testing on our products or ingredients except when required by law.

templates.name: Do you offer gift boxes?
templates.content: Yes, you can choose gift options on the shipping information page of checkout. You will have the option to include a gift message on the packing slip at no charge (up to 160 characters), or gift box the order for $4.00.

templates.name: When will my points expire?
templates.content: Points will expire if you have not earned or redeemed any points within the last 12 months.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find our products at Nordstrom, Sephora, Macy's, Dillards, Bon Ton, Belk, Sephora inside JCP, Von Maur, GVC, Ulta, Lord & Taylor, beautybar.com, birchbox.com and select Philosophy boutiques.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://philosophy.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to contact us via this link: https://philosophy.com/pages/contact Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://philosophy.com/apps/aftership/

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $50. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://philosophy.com/pages/rewards-program

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/lovephilosophy/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/philosophyus/

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and once shipped it will take 5-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://row.ups.com/GuestAccess/Guest/Access

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-568-3151, Monday-Friday 8am-8pm & Saturday-Sunday 9am-6pm, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.
